{"success":true,"response":"The process `J09A` has been executed end-to-end according to the defined rules:

- Temporary working tables were created, filtered to TOURs starting with `J09A`, and `ENTSCHEIDUNG` was set based on `HAUS`/`EQUNR` counts and house-number/address rules.
- Data was joined with `EABLG`, `NET_MASTER`, `SALES_MASTER`, and `EABL`.
- Customer data was chosen per record (sales master preferred when present, otherwise net master).
- Households with mandatory meter reading (SAP machine estimates in both 2023 and 2024) were flagged with `ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'`.
- Two CSV files were generated:
  - `J09A_MANDATORY_READING.csv` (3,244 rows) with all `ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'`.
  - `J09A.csv` (81,076 rows) with all other records.
- Emails were scheduled with attachments:
  - To `mandatory.reading@provider.com` with `J09A_MANDATORY_READING.csv`.
  - To `meter.readings@evu.com` with `J09A.csv`.
- All temporary tables used for this process were dropped to clean up.

structured_content.response:
The process `J09A` has been executed end-to-end according to the defined rules:

- Temporary working tables were created, filtered to TOURs starting with `J09A`, and `ENTSCHEIDUNG` was set based on `HAUS`/`EQUNR` counts and house-number/address rules.
- Data was joined with `EABLG`, `NET_MASTER`, `SALES_MASTER`, and `EABL`.
- Customer data was chosen per record (sales master preferred when present, otherwise net master).
- Households with mandatory meter reading (SAP machine estimates in both 2023 and 2024) were flagged with `ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'`.
- Two CSV files were generated:
  - `J09A_MANDATORY_READING.csv` (3,244 rows) with all `ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'`.
  - `J09A.csv` (81,076 rows) with all other records.
- Emails were scheduled with attachments:
  - To `mandatory.reading@provider.com` with `J09A_MANDATORY_READING.csv`.
  - To `meter.readings@evu.com` with `J09A.csv`.
- All temporary tables used for this process were dropped to clean up.

If you want, I can show you the exact SQL used for any step or a sample of the exported data.

kwargs.content:
Process `J09A` has been executed successfully. Key outcomes:

- All steps in the rule were run end-to-end (temporary tables created, filtered to TOURs starting with `J09A`, business rules applied to set `ENTSCHEIDUNG`).
- Joins with `EABLG`, `NET_MASTER`, `SALES_MASTER`, and `EABL` were completed and customer data resolved per record.
- Households requiring mandatory meter reading (SAP machine estimates in both 2023 and 2024) were flagged as `ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'`.

Generated outputs:

1. `J09A_MANDATORY_READING.csv`  
   - 3,244 rows  
   - Contains all rows with `ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'`.

2. `J09A.csv`  
   - 81,076 rows  
   - Contains all other records.

Email scheduling:

- `mandatory.reading@provider.com` with `J09A_MANDATORY_READING.csv`.
- `meter.readings@evu.com` with `J09A.csv`.

Cleanup:

- All temporary working tables created for this process were dropped.

If you tell me what you care about (e.g., SQL logic for `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, schema of the CSVs, or a sample row), I can drill into that part.
